Self-Hosting Enthusiast: STELTNER.CC

My Personal Homelab

  • Self-Hosted Email Server
  • Matrix Chat Server
  • Mastodon Social Network
  • File Sharing Platform
  • All Open Source
  • Privacy Focused

...because why not? 🤓

Learn More

Hey there! 👋

Welcome to my little corner of the internet! I’m Tobias, and I’m passionate about self-hosting and open-source software.

What started as curiosity about “what if I ran my own email server?” turned into a full-blown homelab addiction. Now I’m running my own Matrix server, Mastodon instance, file sharing platform, and more - all from my own hardware.

Why? Because I believe in digital sovereignty, privacy, and the power of open-source communities. Plus, it’s just really fun to tinker with! 🤓

This isn’t a commercial service - it’s my personal playground where I experiment with self-hosted alternatives to Big Tech services. Want to learn more about self-hosting? Drop me a line!

See What I'm Running

Connect With Me

Find me across the decentralized web and beyond! I’m active on several platforms - some self-hosted, some not (yet 😉). Let’s connect and chat about tech, self-hosting, or anything interesting!

Most AWE.SOME Features

Pellentesque ullamcorper fringilla odio at pretium. Interdum et malesuada fames ac ante ipsum primis in faucibus. Nulla mattis erat dui, ut tempor lectus dictum id.

Email with Mailcow

Full-featured email server with modern webmail, calendar, and contacts. Because who needs Gmail when you can run your own? 📧

Matrix Chat Server

Decentralized messaging that actually works. Chat with friends across the Matrix network, bridge to other platforms, or just enjoy the sci-fi vibes. 💬

Mastodon Social

My own corner of the fediverse! Social media without the corporate overlords. Toots, not tweets. Join the decentralized revolution! 🐘

File Sharing Platform

Cloud storage that's actually mine. Share files, sync across devices, and keep your data where it belongs - on your own hardware. ☁️

All Self-Hosted

Everything runs on my own servers. No tracking, no ads, no mysterious algorithm changes. Just good old-fashioned computing. 🏠

Open Source Love

Built entirely with open-source software. Because the best things in computing are free (as in freedom). Fork it, modify it, improve it! 🔓

...and so much more!

Get in Touch

Get in Touch

Want to chat about self-hosting? Have questions about running your own services? Or just want to say hi? I’d love to hear from you! Drop me a message and I’ll get back to you soon.
